args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
grep -q '"name":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"cache_namespace":"compile-cache"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"cache_sharing":"content_addressed"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"portability_scope":"gpu_architecture_family"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"topology_scope":"cross_rank_and_cross_process"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"warmup_scope":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"stable_identity":"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"equivalence_identity":"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"closure_verification_criteria":\[' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"cache_sharing":"content_addressed"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"region_stable_identity":"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"region_equivalence_identity":"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
printf 'named-compile-regions\n'
